quotes.text: Your landing page has 7 CTAs. That's not a landing page, that's a panic attack.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your SaaS has a gradient hero section, a stock photo of a diverse team laughing at a laptop, and three columns of features nobody reads — congratulations, you've built the internet.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best landing page converts at 5%. The average is 2%. Your landing page converts at 0.1% but you think it's 'fine.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS landing page explains what you do in one sentence. If it takes a paragraph, rewrite it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your landing page should do one thing: get the visitor to take one action. Everything else is a distraction.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your landing page is your best salesperson. Make it work while you sleep.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to validate an indie idea is to build a landing page, collect emails, and see who signs up.
quotes.author: based
